question:
how does the bull move

cot: At [FRAME:t=69.0], the mechanical bull is in a low, crouched position and begins to lift its front end while rotating. At [FRAME:t=69.0], the bull is spinning clockwise and rising, with the rider raising one arm. At [FRAME:t=69.0], the bull reaches a peak in its spin, body tilted upward, rider leaning back. At [FRAME:t=69.0], the bull is fully upright and spinning, confirming upward motion. At [FRAME:t=69.0], the bull starts descending while continuing to spin, indicating downward movement. At [FRAME:t=74.0], the bull is again crouched, completing the cycle of spinning and vertical motion. The visual sequence confirms continuous spinning and up-and-down motion.
